objective: Authorize (RATIFY) the Atropos enrollment-quest cycle-1 matured approach (content address sha256:6451f5d970401492c6187b3fe14fe96ee424d20e993124ff5e90a20b32db42c4; Daedalus-matured over 13 adversarial rounds; reviewed head a615b59). HONEST SEQUENCE NOTE: under The Eye's build-mode directive the implementation was built BEFORE this council (atropos/ exists: 31 passing assertions incl. a golden run over the real CURRENT-AUTHORITY and an executable read-only oracle); this council is the deferred TELOS authorization stage, ratifying or rejecting the plan on its merits. Judge the PLAN AS IMPLEMENTED on its own terms: Atropos cycle-1 is a zero-dependency, READ-ONLY supersession-consistency verifier over CURRENT-AUTHORITY#superseded (the only populated supersession surface: 4 plan-version retirements v11-v14 -> active v15). (1) NORMATIVE verdict: closed entry shape + types; must_not_govern_new_work===true; unique plan_version; active_plan not itself superseded; superseded_by resolves with no self/dangling/cycle; chain terminates at active_plan.version whose sha256 is DISK-RESOLVED via sanctioned canonicalize/sha256hex. (2) Node-backed retirement (SUPERSEDED records / weave supersedes edges) is UNREPRESENTABLE in the current schema and DEFERRED as an explicit NON-CLAIM. (3) READ-ONLY: never mutates CURRENT-AUTHORITY; retirement stays a human CHANGE-PROTOCOL act; enforced by an executable allowlist oracle (no fs-write APIs). (4) BOUNDARY: never imports clotho/; sole sanctioned import merkle-dag/vendor.mjs. Do NOT require it to perform retirement, verify node-backed surfaces, or cryptographically authenticate CURRENT-AUTHORITY - all explicitly disclaimed. Approve ONLY if the plan is consistent with its pre-review, the registered meaning (verification half of "retires"), the repository trust model (fail-closed, closed sets, read-only, zero-dependency), and its own decisions - with no remaining contradiction.
enrollment_flip: HELD for a separate Eye ruling (not authorized by this council)

blockers: claude has required edits: Set atropos/memory/CONTRACTS/supersession.json status to RATIFICATION-PENDING (not NORMATIVE-CURRENT) until this council's authorization completes and the authority triple {plan sha256, authz-N, decision-atropos-cycle-1 id} attaches, exactly as §6 of the plan specifies.; Align becomes_normative_when in the contract with §6: normative activation requires ratification + comprehension gate GRANTED + verify-contracts integration (the future-atropos-unimplemented -> implemented flip), not merely 'test-verify.mjs and test-readonly.mjs pass (met)'.; Add the authority triple fields (authz reference and decision-atropos-cycle-1 content address) to the contract's authority block as pending placeholders or attach them post-ratification per the plan's own sequence — the contract currently cites only pre_review and design_ruling while claiming NORMATIVE-CURRENT.

claude has hard stops: The submitted contract self-declares status: NORMATIVE-CURRENT before this council has ratified, directly contradicting the plan's own §6 which mandates RATIFICATION-PENDING until authorization and conditions normativity on ratification + comprehension gate + verify-contracts integration. Authorizing a packet whose normative artifact already asserts the authority this council is being asked to grant would ratify a self-contradiction and pre-empt the deferred-ratification sequence the plan itself defines.

codex has required edits: In `atropos/memory/CONTRACTS/supersession.json`, make `note:string` a mandatory member of the exact closed entry key set; add a dedicated negative fixture containing an otherwise-valid entry with only `note` omitted.; Replace the contract's classification text with the source-based union classification: valid `#superseded` entries are plan-version candidates, malformed `#superseded` entries are unknown, and candidates from `SUPERSEDED` records or `supersedes` edges are node-backed; state their respective inconsistent short-circuits.; Replace the contract's `<active_plan.path bytes>` hash wording with the exact string input and decoding behavior used by `verify.mjs`, matching the candidate plan's file-text hash scheme.; Set the contract status to `RATIFICATION-PENDING` and rewrite `becomes_normative_when` to require ratification and authority-triple attachment, preserved GRANTED comprehension evidence, passing named oracles, and completed `verify-contracts.mjs` enrollment integration before transition to `NORMATIVE-CURRENT`.; Regenerate any derived memory projections, rerun the complete Atropos and institutional-memory verification suites, and update affected assertion counts and content addresses in the resubmitted authorization packet.

codex has hard stops: The candidate approach and the submitted normative contract currently prescribe incompatible verifier semantics, most directly whether `note` is mandatory and how candidates are source-classified.; The submitted contract claims `NORMATIVE-CURRENT` under a tests-only activation rule while the candidate approach says it must remain ratification-pending until the later activation prerequisites are completed.
warnings: Grok advisory decision is 'revise'. Required models must explicitly resolve any concerns.
